appliedRows.title: Transcript: 'How to Use Claude Code Like the People Who Built It'
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: The transcript of AI & I with Claude Code engineers Cat Wu and Boris Cherny... Selection reason: 这是Boris Cherny参与的播客转录，提供了关于Claude Code使用的权威见解，包括斜杠命令和技能等特性，能有效补强原始声明的上下文。 Source preview: Home Newsletter Columnists Columns Podcast Products Events Consulting Store Search About us Careers Advertise with us The team FAQ Help center X / Twitter LinkedIn Spotify YouTube Apple Podcasts Dan Shipper is the CEO and cofounder of Every. Every week he explores the frontiers of AI in his column, Chain of Thought, and on his podcast, ‘AI & I.’ Read with AI Open with Plus One Your AI collaborator — pre-loaded with Every's best tools and workflows. Transcript: ‘How to Use Claude Code Like the People Who Built It’ 'AI & I' with Anthropic's Cat Wu and Boris Cherny October 29, 2025 · Updated March 24, 2026 Like 6 Comments The transcript of AI & I with Claude Code engineers Cat Wu and Boris Che... MiMo rationale: 原始声明过于简短，缺乏上下文。候选来源中，Vibe Coder Blog文章和Every.to播客转录均明确提及Boris Cherny作为Claude Code创建者，并详细讨论了斜杠命令和技能等特性，能有效补强原始声明的信息价值和权威性。其他来源要么权威性不足，要么缺乏直接证据。 Evidence requirements: Source must name Boris Cherny directly. | Source must support why "You can do this with slash commands. Enabling it for skills also in the next release. Thanks for the" belongs on this person's page, or provide a better authoritative replacement. | Prefer official profile, institution/company page, paper detail page, author page, interview transcript, or reliable media with clear attribution. | Do not use search pages, login walls, empty captures, generic product pages without person role, or social snippets without context as replace_source. appliedRows.title: Ilya Sutskever's home page
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: Ilya Sutskever Co-founder and Chief Scientist of OpenAI. I spent three wonderful years as a Research Scientist at the Google Brain Team. Selection reason: 多伦多大学官方个人主页，明确列出其职位（OpenAI联合创始人兼首席科学家）及职业经历，是权威的学术机构来源。 Source preview: Ilya Sutskever Co-founder and Chief Scientist of OpenAI. I spent three wonderful years as a Research Scientist at the Google Brain Team. Before that, I was a co-founder of DNNresearch. And before that, I was a postdoc in Stanford with Andrew Ng's group. And in the beginning, I was a student in the Machine Learning group of Toronto, working with Geoffrey Hinton. publications awards Google scholar profile RNN text generation demo MiMo rationale: 原始来源为无效社交媒体链接。候选中的多伦多大学官方主页直接、权威地证明了Ilya Sutskever的职位和背景，符合替换要求。其他来源虽提及人物，但权威性或直接性不足。 Evidence requirements: Source must name Ilya Sutskever directly. | Source must support why "//x.com/ilyasut/status/1940802278979690613" belongs on this person's page, or provide a better authoritative replacement. | Prefer official profile, institution/company page, paper detail page, author page, interview transcript, or reliable media with clear attribution. | Do not use search pages, login walls, empty captures, generic product pages without person role, or social snippets without context as replace_source. appliedRows.title: Essential AI
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: Announcing Rnj-1: Building Instruments of Intelligence Ashish Vaswani December 5th, 2025 Selection reason: Essential AI 官方博客，由阿希什·瓦斯瓦尼撰写，宣布 Rnj-1 模型，直接关联人物与作品。 Source preview: Essential AI Image 1: Essential AI LogoImage 2: Essential animation [[]About]( [[]Research]( [[]Careers]( [[]News]( Talk to us Talk to us December 2025•Blog Announcing Rnj-1: Building Instruments of Intelligence Ashish Vaswani December 5th, 2025 The long-term advancement and equitable diffusion of AI technologies crucially depend on their development in the Open. In the US, a few stalwarts of open-source AI are protecting its future. Today, we are proud to make our first model contribution to the open-source canon with Rnj-1 (an homage to Ramanujan, pronounced “range-1”), a world-class pair of base and instruction-tuned large language models. In this blog, we will summarize the key capabili... MiMo rationale: 候选来源中，essential.ai/research/rnj-1 是官方博客，由阿希什·瓦斯瓦尼撰写，直接关联人物与 Rnj-1 模型，可作为权威来源补强。其他来源要么未提及人物，要么为社交媒体或第三方页面，证据不足。 Evidence requirements: Source must name 阿希什·瓦斯瓦尼 directly. | Source must support why "Rnj-1-Instruct is now the #1 trending text generation model on HF!" belongs on this person's page, or provide a better authoritative replacement. | Prefer official profile, institution/company page, paper detail page, author page, interview transcript, or reliable media with clear attribution. | Do not use search pages, login walls, empty captures, generic product pages without person role, or social snippets without context as replace_source. appliedRows.title: Nvidia CEO Huang at Stanford: Pain and suffering breeds success
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: Nvidia CEO Huang at Stanford: Pain and suffering breeds success Selection reason: 权威媒体报道，标题和描述明确指向黄仁勋在斯坦福大学的演讲，内容直接关联韧性、品格与成功。 Source preview: Skip Navigation logo logo Success Startups Side Hustles Power Players Leadership Money Earn Spend Save and Invest Become Debt-Free Work Land the Job Get Ahead Level Up Science of Success Life Pop Culture and Media Psychology and Relationships Health and Wellness Real Estate Video Most Popular CNBC TV Courses make itCNBC.COM Related Stories Raising Successful KidsStop teaching kids skills that will be outdated in 10 years—how I'm raising kids AI can't replace Power PlayersMasterClass CEO's biggest myths about success: ‘Hard work, alone, is not enough’ Make It Book ClubShe did everything ‘right’ but felt ‘desperately unhappy’—the mindset shift that changed her life WorkUsing AI can add extra ... MiMo rationale: 原始来源为社交媒体帖子，缺乏权威性。CNBC作为权威媒体，其报道直接关联黄仁勋在斯坦福大学的演讲，内容与韧性、品格和成功主题高度匹配，可作为可靠替换来源。 Evidence requirements: Source must name 黄仁勋 directly. | Source must support why "Quote from Jensen Huang on resilience, character, and hardship shaping success." belongs on this person's page, or provide a better authoritative replacement. | Prefer official profile, institution/company page, paper detail page, author page, interview transcript, or reliable media with clear attribution. | Do not use search pages, login walls, empty captures, generic product pages without person role, or social snippets without context as replace_source.
